description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a predominantly teal color accented by yellow and white stripes. The hull is wide and flat at the rear, tapering sharply to a pointed nose, suggesting high-speed aquatic performance. The upper structure includes two prominent, upward-curving fins and a central spine, giving it a futuristic and aggressive appearance. The handlebar area is integrated into the main body, with no visible separation, and the seating area appears streamlined and contoured for a single rider. The surface finish is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the modern design. No visible brand logos, model names, or registration numbers are present on the exterior.
description: A futuristic teal jet ski with yellow and white accents, featuring a streamlined body, upward fins, and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated, pointed nose and the wide, flat rear with visible yellow and white striping.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow, pointed nose, symmetrical upward fins, and central spine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the hull's contours and accent colors.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the broad, flat back, upward fins, and the central spine extending toward the nose.
attribute_handlebar_design: Integrated into the main body, the handlebar is streamlined with upward curves and no visible grips or controls, matching the teal and yellow color scheme.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single, streamlined seat contoured into the body, with no visible seams or padding, finished in teal.
